title: schedonorus exaltatus
intro: Schedonorus exaltatus, commonly known as Deer Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Schedonorus exaltatus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
